rationale: Increasing the homestead exemption reduces taxable appraised value, which affects the local share calculation under §48.256 referenced in the §48.203 DTR limitationformula, requiring consequential amendment to maintain rate alignment.
quote: the rate used to determine the district's local share under Section 48.256
_note: §48.203 does not directly reference the homestead exemption, but its formula depends on §48.256 local share, which is sensitive to taxable value changes from homestead exemption adjustments.
